privileged_info_summary: The task is a synthetic library book management exercise using LibreOffice Calc with 17 items (10 books, 7 DVDs) from three library branches. Key specifications: Main Library has 21-day loan periods while North/South Branches have 14 days; late fees are $0.25/day for books ($1.75 for 7 days) and $1.00/day for DVDs ($7.00 for 7 days); items with 3+ renewals cannot be renewed unless holds are removed (< 3 renewals AND no holds required). The dataset has dates from 2024-01-01 to 2024-01-24 with varying renewal states (0-3 renewals used) and holds. Task requires 180 seconds and max 15 steps; success requires passing 70% (5 of 7) verification criteria including due date formulas, days-until-due calculations with TODAY(), renewal logic, late fee calculations, priority assignment, conditional formatting, and proper data sorting.
